hero.sub: We build websites that really work for local businesses — driving schools, hair salons, restaurants and more.

features.label: Why MINUZ
features.p: No template. No compromise. Every website is built individually.

cards.title: Ready within a week
cards.desc: From initial call to live launch — in less than seven business days.

cards.title: Ultra-fast loading
cards.desc: Maximum loading speed for better Google ranking and more customers.

cards.title: Always here for you
cards.desc: Personal contact person. Updates and changes included.

portfolio.label: Portfolio
portfolio.p: See what a website for your business could look like — individual, modern, convincing.

items.d: Free consultation. We get to know your business.
We build your dream website in just a few days.
Live, optimized and ready for new customers.

pricing.label: Transparent Pricing
pricing.note: * Based on annual billing. All prices excl. VAT.

items.q: How long does website creation take?
items.a: Between 5 and 10 business days — from initial call to live launch. For projects with special requirements, we discuss this beforehand.
No. The monthly price is all you pay. For new customers, the setup fee is also waived completely.

items.q: Can I edit the website myself later?
items.a: Yes. You get access to a simple dashboard for texts, images and opening hours — no technical knowledge required.

items.q: What happens if I want to cancel?
items.a: 30-day notice period. No paperwork, no complications. Your website stays online until the last day.

contact.label: Contact
contact.h2:
Get in touch.
We'll build it.
contact.p: No risk. No contract. Just one inquiry — and we'll show you what's possible.

steps.d: No chatbot. A real person from our team.
We learn about your business and show first ideas.

contact.successDesc: We will get back to you within 24 hours. Promise.
contact.errorDesc: Something went wrong. Please try again.
